text:
(2) of regulation 3 and sub-regulation (1) of regulation 4 of the Securities and Exchange
Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 in respect of
investment in companies listed on the SME exchange or SME segment of an exchange
pursuant to due diligence of such companies subject to the following conditions:
(i) the fund shall disclose any trading in securities pursuant to such due-diligence, within
two trading days of such trading, to the stock exchanges where the investee company
is listed;
(ii) such investment shall be locked in for a period of one year from the date of
investment.]
Conditions for Category III Alternative Investment Funds.
sentence_window:
--- PAGE 32 ---
Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations,
2018]. 93[(f) Category II Alternative Investment Funds shall be exempt from sub-regulations (1) and (2) of regulation 3 and sub-regulation (1) of regulation 4 of the Securities and Exchange
Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 in respect of
investment in companies listed on the SME exchange or SME segment of an exchange
pursuant to due diligence of such companies subject to the following conditions:
(i) the fund shall disclose any trading in securities pursuant to such due-diligence, within
two trading days of such trading, to the stock exchanges where the investee company
is listed;
(ii) such investment shall be locked in for a period of one year from the date of
investment.]
Conditions for Category III Alternative Investment Funds. 18. The following investment conditions shall apply to Category III Alternative Investment
Funds:-
94[(a) Category III Alternative Investment Funds may invest in securities of listed or unlisted
investee companies, derivatives, units of other Alternative Investment Funds or complex or
structured products;]
95[(aa) Category III Alternative Investment Funds may deal in goods received in delivery against
physical settlement of commodity derivatives;]
93 Substituted by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds) (Fourth Amendment)
Regulations, 2018, w.e.f.
